name: Payroll Knowledge Base — machine-readable data layer
description: JSON parse-layer generated from (and validated against) the verified markdown in ph/** and sg/**. The markdown is the human/AI reading layer and the source of truth; these files are for programmatic use. Regenerate with `node tools/build-data.mjs`.

files.topic: SSS monthly contribution by salary bracket
Graduated income tax / withholding on compensation (2023-onward TRAIN)

files.source_issuance: HDMF Circular No. 460 (via DBM Circular Letter 2024-2)
Presidential Decree 851 (mandate); RA 10963 / TRAIN (₱90,000 tax-free ceiling)

files.topic: Daily minimum wage by region (private sector, non-agri high / agri-small low)
Premium pay multipliers — overtime, night differential, rest day, special day, holiday
files.source_issuance: DOLE Handbook on Workers' Statutory Monetary Benefits (2024 ed.); Labor Code (PD 442) Arts. 86-94

files.topic: Statutory leave durations (SIL, maternity, paternity, solo-parent, special leave for women, VAWC)
files.source_issuance: Labor Code Art. 95; RA 11210; RA 8187; RA 8972/RA 11861; RA 9710; RA 9262 (maternity tax exemption: BIR RMC 105-2019)

files.topic: Worked monthly net-pay examples (employee-side), computed from the rate files
files.source_issuance: Derived from the data/ rate files (SSS Circular 2024-006, BIR RR 8-2018, PhilHealth PA2025-0002, HDMF Circular 460)

files.topic: Singapore resident income tax on chargeable income (From YA2024 onwards)
files.source_issuance: IRAS — Individual Income Tax rates (resident), From YA2024 onwards

files.topic: Singapore CPF contribution rates by age band + Skills Development Levy (SDL)
files.source_issuance: CPF Board — contribution rate tables (1 Jan 2025 / 2026 / 2027)
LHDN — Individual income tax rates (YA2024 onwards)

files.topic: Malaysia statutory contributions — EPF, SOCSO, EIS, HRD Corp levy
files.source_issuance: KWSP (EPF Act 1991 Third Schedule); PERKESO (Act 4 SOCSO + Act 800 EIS); HRD Corp (PSMB Act 2001)

files.topic: Thailand personal income tax (PIT) on net income
files.source_issuance: Thai Revenue Department — PIT rates (2024 PND.91 guide)

files.topic: Thailand Social Security Fund (SSF) + Workmen's Compensation Fund (WCF)
files.source_issuance: Social Security Office; Royal Gazette Ministerial Regulation (12 Dec 2025, SSF wage ceiling)

files.topic: Indonesia PPh 21 annual income tax + PTKP
files.source_issuance: DJP — UU HPP No. 7/2021 (rates); PTKP (PMK 101/2016); TER monthly method (PP 58/2023)
BPJS Ketenagakerjaan (PP 44/45/46-2015; JP cap Surat Edaran B/1226/022026); BPJS Kesehatan (Perpres 64/2020)

files.topic: Vietnam resident PIT — 5-bracket monthly scale (Law 109/2025, from 2026 tax period)
files.source_issuance: Law on Personal Income Tax 109/2025/QH15 (Dieu 9 rates, Dieu 10 deductions); Circular 111/2013 (withholding)

files.topic: Vietnam compulsory insurances — Social (BHXH) + Health (BHYT) + Unemployment (BHTN)
files.source_issuance: Law on Social Insurance 41/2024/QH15; Decree 73/2024 (base salary); Law on Health Insurance; Law on Employment (UI)
